title: Update One Row
description: Welcome to Rank Challenge. A single account (id 42) needs to be deactivated. The current UPDATE has no WHERE clause, so it would change every user! Add a WHERE clause so only the user with `id = 42` is set to `'inactive'`.
hints: Without WHERE, UPDATE changes every row in the table.
WHERE id = 42 targets exactly one account.

files.content:
-- TODO: make sure only account number 42 is changed, not the whole table
UPDATE users SET status = 'inactive';

parseRules.failMessage: Set the new status with SET.
Add WHERE so only one row changes.
